languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Ведь именно она побуждает нас на поступки, которые придают жизни смысл и достоинство. Вы смелый человек, Вольный Торговец".
"For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Ведь именно она побуждает нас на поступки, которые придают жизни смысл и достоинство. Вы смелый человек, Вольный Торговец".

traits.locale_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."
"For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."
"For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: «Pues eso es lo que nos impulsa a hacer las cosas que otorgan sentido y dignidad a la vida. Es un{mf||a} {mf|hombre|mujer} interesante, Comerciante».
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Pues eso es lo que nos impulsa a hacer las cosas que otorgan sentido y dignidad a la vida. Es un{mf||a} {mf|hombre|mujer} interesante, Comerciante».

languages.text: “正是这种信念，驱使我们去做那些赋予生命意义和尊严的事情。您是个勇敢的人，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “正是这种信念，驱使我们去做那些赋予生命意义和尊严的事情。您是个勇敢的人，行商浪人。”

languages.text: « Car c'est ce qui nous incite à faire ce qui donne à la vie du sens et de la dignité. Vous êtes {mf|un homme courageux|une femme courageuse}, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Car c'est ce qui nous incite à faire ce qui donne à la vie du sens et de la dignité. Vous êtes {mf|un homme courageux|une femme courageuse}, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Denn das spornt uns an, die Dinge zu tun, die dem Leben einen Sinn und Würde verleihen. Ihr seid {mf|ein mutiger Mann|eine mutige Frau}, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Denn das spornt uns an, die Dinge zu tun, die dem Leben einen Sinn und Würde verleihen. Ihr seid {mf|ein mutiger Mann|eine mutige Frau}, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: 「人生に意味と尊厳を与える行いへと我々を駆り立てるものだからだ。君は勇敢な{mf|男|女}だ、ローグ・トレーダー」
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: 「人生に意味と尊厳を与える行いへと我々を駆り立てるものだからだ。君は勇敢な{mf|男|女}だ、ローグ・トレーダー」

languages.text: "Bizi hayata anlam ve değer katan şeyleri yapmaya teşvik eden budur. Cesur bir insansınız Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."
